positive: A whimsical, abstract depiction of a stylized celestial forest, showing bioluminescent mushrooms, winding crystal roots, and floating geometric orbs in a deep indigo and turquoise nebula background. The main subject is a stylized, central grouping of ethereal flora and fauna silhouettes (e.g., stylized owls, fox tails, crescent moons) set against the glow. Use clean, high-contrast vector style with intricate linework and negative space. The overall mood is magical and dreamy. Studio quality, excellent silhouette definition, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Flat composition, central focus, intricate detail, maximum clarity.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photographic, realistic, grayscales, jpeg artifacts
